metadata.name: sms_forwarding
metadata.description: 超低成本硬件短信转发器，支持移动联通电信，ML307R+ESP32C3

summary.zh: 本项目是一款超低成本的硬件短信转发器，基于 ESP32C3 与 ML307R 模组构建，支持移动、联通、电信卡。核心功能包括短信自动接收与多通道推送（如钉钉、飞书、Bark 等），提供 Web 管理界面进行参数配置与状态监控，并支持长短信合并及远程设备重启，是个人物联网通知与保号管理的理想方案。
summary.en: This project is a low-cost hardware SMS forwarding device built on ESP32C3 and ML307R modules, supporting major carriers. It features automatic SMS reception and multi-channel push notifications (e.g., DingTalk, Feishu, Bark). It includes a Web management interface for configuration and monitoring, supports long SMS merging and remote device restart, making it an ideal solution for personal IoT notifications and number retention management.

metadata.name: QwenPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: QwenPaw是一款个人AI助手工具，支持本地/云端灵活部署，具备多聊天应用集成与可扩展技能模块。核心价值在于用户完全掌控数据隐私，内置PDF/Office处理、新闻摘要等自动化功能，适用于个人效率提升与跨平台协作场景。
summary.en: QwenPaw is a personal AI assistant tool enabling local/cloud deployment with multi-channel integration and extensible skills. Key features include full data control, built-in PDF/Office processing, news summarization, and automation capabilities for personal productivity and cross-platform collaboration.

metadata.name: GithubStarsManager
metadata.description: An app for managing github starred repositories.

summary.zh: GithubStarsManager 是一款全平台桌面应用，旨在解决 GitHub 星标仓库管理混乱的问题。它通过 AI 自动生成摘要与分类，结合 Cloudflare Vectorize 实现精准的语义搜索。支持发布跟踪、一键下载及 Gist 管理，数据 100% 本地存储，兼顾智能化与隐私安全。
summary.en: GithubStarsManager is a cross-platform desktop app designed to organize GitHub starred repositories. It leverages AI for auto-summarization and categorization, utilizing Cloudflare Vectorize for precise semantic search. Features include release tracking, one-click downloads, and Gist management, ensuring 100% local data privacy while enhancing developer productivity.

metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: GitHub Stars Index 是一款自动化知识管理工具，利用 AI 自动抓取并总结 GitHub Star 仓库。它具备标签归一化治理、增量同步及并发处理机制，支持生成 Markdown/HTML 静态页，并可无缝同步至 Obsidian 知识库，实现高效的技术栈追踪与检索。
summary.en: GitHub Stars Index is an automated knowledge management tool that uses AI to fetch and summarize starred repositories. It features tag normalization, incremental sync, and concurrency support. It generates Markdown/HTML static pages and syncs seamlessly to Obsidian, enabling efficient tech stack tracking and retrieval.
